page.title: Settings
page.description: Manage your account and application preferences

profileSettings.title: Profile Settings
profileSettings.description: Manage your personal information and preferences

teamManagement.title: Team Management
teamManagement.description: Invite team members and manage permissions

tutorial.title: Choose Your Tutorial
tutorial.subtitle: Select a tutorial to learn about specific features of the platform. Each tutorial is interactive and guides you step-by-step.
tutorial.tip: Each tutorial uses an interactive spotlight to guide you through specific features. The screen will darken except for the area you need to focus on. Follow the instructions and click where indicated to progress.
tutorial.exitHint: You can exit any tutorial at any time by clicking the X button.

steps.toneDescription: Define the tone, style, and personality of your AI communications
steps.guardrailsDescription: Set boundaries and restrictions for what your AI should never do
steps.audience: Who is your AI writing to?
steps.audienceDescription: Identify your target audience and key offerings
steps.additionalDescription: Share any other important information you want the AI to remember

customizeAi.formality: How formal or casual should your AI sound?
customizeAi.conciseness: Should your AI be concise or more descriptive?
customizeAi.proactiveness: Should your AI communicate proactively or take a more consultative approach?
customizeAi.onBrandPhrases: List phrases that feel on-brand for your company
customizeAi.onBrandPhrasesPlaceholder: e.g., 'Let's solve this together', 'Here's what we found', 'We're here to help'...
customizeAi.avoidPhrases: List phrases you never want your AI to use
customizeAi.avoidPhrasesPlaceholder: e.g., 'As per my last email', 'Unfortunately', 'To be honest'...
customizeAi.guardrailTopics: List topics your AI should avoid in communications
customizeAi.guardrailTopicsPlaceholder: e.g., Mentioning prices or discounts, Naming competitors, Making legal/medical/financial claims, Using aggressive or pushy wording, Using urgency language (e.g., 'Act now!')...
customizeAi.avoidTopics: Which other topics should your AI avoid?
customizeAi.avoidTopicsPlaceholder: e.g., Politics, religion, internal company matters, controversial social issues...
customizeAi.otherClaims: Are there any other claims or topics your AI should never touch?
customizeAi.otherClaimsPlaceholder: e.g., Specific uptime guarantees, future product roadmap details, unverified performance metrics...
customizeAi.idealCustomers: Who are your ideal customer types?
customizeAi.roles: Which roles or decision-makers do you primarily sell to?
customizeAi.products: List the main products or services you want the AI to highlight
customizeAi.productsPlaceholder: e.g., Enterprise Platform, Analytics Suite, Professional Services, API Integration Tools...
customizeAi.additionalContext: Anything else you want your AI to remember?
customizeAi.additionalContextTip: The more context you provide, the better your AI can adapt to your specific needs and communication style.

skipped.title: Questionnaire Skipped
skipped.message: You can complete this questionnaire later from your account settings. We recommend completing it to help us serve you better.

complete.title: Saved Successfully!
complete.message: Your AI preferences have been saved. You can update them anytime from your account settings.

wizard.configuredDesc: Your onboarding is complete. Edit individual sections below.
wizard.readyDesc: {company} is set up to create Deal Rooms and reach Western buyers.
wizard.hintProducts: This forms the foundation of your buyer-facing Deal Room.
wizard.hintHsCodes: HS codes enable tariff-aware pricing and buyer matching.
wizard.hintGuardrails: Your AI assistant will respect these boundaries in all communications.
wizard.hintFactory: Factory details build trust and credibility with Western buyers.
wizard.tellUsAboutProducts: Tell us about your products and company.
wizard.productDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe what you manufacture. You can write in Chinese or English.
wizard.companyNameZhPlaceholder: 深圳市先进制造有限公司
wizard.hsCodesDesc: Harmonized System codes for tariff classification.
wizard.kickoffFetching: Fetching 100 US buyers, deep-enriching top matches, and pulling competitor context. This takes about a minute.
wizard.kickoffWaiting: Another session is already preparing your data. Waiting for it to finish…
wizard.kickoffFailed: Failed to prepare buyer data. Please contact support.
wizard.kickoffHint: Please keep this tab open. You'll be redirected automatically when everything is ready.
wizard.topicsToAvoidPlaceholder: Don't discuss pricing of competitors, avoid political topics...
wizard.hardRestrictionsPlaceholder: Never mention lawsuits, sanctions, or regulatory investigations...
wizard.claimsNotToMakePlaceholder: Don't claim FDA approval unless verified...
wizard.additionalContextPlaceholder: Other context about your business or buyer expectations...
wizard.optionalConfigureLater: Optional. You can configure these later in Settings.
wizard.teamDataWarning: This information was set up by your team.
wizard.teamDataWarningDesc: Any changes will update company-wide settings for all team members.
wizard.signInDifferentAccount: Sign in with a different account
wizard.factoryProfileDesc: Production details for your buyer-facing Deal Room.
wizard.noCertsYet: No certifications yet. Add ISO, CE, UL, or other certificates.
wizard.optionalAddLater: Optional. You can add these later in Settings.

hardRestrictions.noShipmentDates: Never confirm shipment dates in writing

prohibitedStatements.noCustomsBroker: Don't claim to be a customs broker

customizeAi.productDescriptionRequired: Please enter a product description first.
customizeAi.hsCodeSuggestionFailed: Failed to get HS code suggestions

state.ready: Done — we filled in what we found
state.readyHint: Review and edit before saving. Source: {filename}

errors.extractionFailed: The extractor couldn't pull structured data from this file.
errors.timeout: Processing took too long. Please try again.

productReview.title: Import product catalog
productReview.subtitle: Drop a file, review the extracted products, and save.
productReview.emptyState: No products extracted yet. Drop a catalog PDF above to get started.
productReview.specsCount: {count, plural, =0 {no specs} one {# spec} other {# specs}}

toast.failed: Couldn't save products. Please try again.

columnMapping.title: Map your columns
columnMapping.subtitle: We guessed which of your spreadsheet columns go where. Fix anything that looks wrong, then apply.
columnMapping.errorNameRequired: Exactly one column must be mapped to Name.
columnMapping.errorApplyFailed: Couldn't apply the mapping. Please try again.

onboarding.accountNotFound: Your account information was not found in the database.
onboarding.contactAdmin: Please contact your administrator to be added to the system.
onboarding.newMemberWillJoin: The new member will join {company} with access to {database}
onboarding.mustBeRegistered: You must be registered in the system to send invitations.
onboarding.inviteFirst: Start by inviting your first team member above
onboarding.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {email} from the team? This action cannot be undone.
onboarding.tutorialDescription: Take interactive tutorials to learn specific features! Choose from Dashboard & Navigation, Lead Generation, CRM, or User Onboarding tutorials.
onboarding.toastInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
onboarding.toastEmailAlreadyInvited: This email has already been invited
onboarding.toastInviteSyncWarning: Warning: User invited but not synced to employee_info. Reason: {reason}
onboarding.toastTutorialStarted: {tutorialType} tutorial started! Follow the spotlight to continue.
onboarding.toastAiPreferencesSkipped: You can customize AI preferences anytime from settings

migrationNotice.title: Settings Migration Notice
migrationNotice.description: Settings functionality is being migrated to Next.js
migrationNotice.body: We're currently migrating all settings functionality to provide you with a better experience. This includes:

smtp.title: Email Server (SMTP/IMAP)
smtp.description: Connect your own email account (QQ Mail, 163 Mail, corporate mail, etc.) to send and receive emails through Prelude.
